overall.description: A first-person exploration through a sunlit European coastal town in Unreal Engine 5, beginning along a waterfront promenade and turning into a narrow rock-lined street. The scene features historic stone architecture with red tile roofs, clear blue skies, and sparse vehicle traffic passing by.

events.description: dark pickup truck drives past from right to left
white car drives past from right to left

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the waterfront promenade beside the water

notable_agents.action: dark pickup truck driving along the road
white car following the truck along the road

entered.detail: stone walkway and steps leading down to the water's edge
row of European-style stone buildings with red tile roofs and multiple stories
wide stone steps descending from the promenade to the water
zebra crossing painted across the asphalt road ahead

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a bright waterfront promenade with historic European stone buildings lining the right side. The camera walks forward along the asphalt path, passing stone steps leading down to the water. Two vehicles, a dark pickup truck and a white car, drive past on the right as the camera approaches a crosswalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: intersection crossing into narrow rock-lined street

events.description: camera turns right to enter narrow street between rock formations
white car passes by on the right as the turn completes

agents.ego_description: turning right at the intersection to enter a narrower enclosed street

notable_agents.action: white car passing by as the camera turns into the narrow street

entered.detail: large moss-covered rock outcroppings and boulders lining the right side of the street
constricted road passage leading between tall rock walls

segments.scene_description: The camera crosses the intersection and turns right, leaving the waterfront behind. Large rock formations appear on the right side as the street narrows. A white car passes by closely on the right as the camera enters the constricted passage, with the historic buildings now visible only in the distance on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow rock canyon street with tree canopy

events.description: entering deeply enclosed rocky corridor with walls on both sides
slight curve to the left as the winding street continues

agents.ego_description: walking through the narrow rock-lined corridor, observing the stone walls and overhead trees

entered.detail: tall vertical rock walls forming the left side of the narrow canyon passage
tall green leafy trees growing between the rock formations overhead

segments.scene_description: The camera proceeds through a narrow, canyon-like street enclosed by high rock walls on both sides. Tall trees create dappled shadows overhead. The historic buildings are no longer visible, replaced by natural rock formations that create a tunnel-like atmosphere. The path winds slightly as it continues deeper into the rocky corridor.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a wide, sunlit waterfront promenade into a narrow, canyon-like rocky corridor. It begins by walking along an asphalt path lined with historic stone buildings, passing stone steps and moving past a dark pickup truck and a white car toward a crosswalk. As the camera crosses the intersection and turns right, the open waterfront recedes and the street narrows, with large rock formations emerging on the right and a white car passing closely by. The scene then shifts into a constricted passage where the architecture disappears, replaced by high rock walls on both sides that create a tunnel-like atmosphere. Finally, the camera proceeds deeper into this rocky corridor, winding slightly under the dappled shadows of tall overhead trees.
